[[Portal:File:The-portal-group-icon-flat-dark.png|link=|right|150px]]

Projects in the Portal Community are primarily tracked by [[Portal:The Portal Projects Group]]. Each project is related to ideas expressed on [[Portal:The Portal Podcast]] or by [[Portal:Eric Weinstein]]. If you know of a project that isn't on this list, please add it!

This page exists to:
* Present completed work and connect volunteers to projects
* Nurture new projects and bring them to life

== List of Projects ==
<section begin=projects-boxes /><div class="projects-container">
    <div class="grid-column">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Graph, Wall, Tome===
|content=[https://discord.gg/Z3u3pPm Discord] Fundamental physics seems unreachable for many. This project and its subprojects aim to map and convey the information necessary to understand the most vibrant realm of human knowledge. 
* '''[[Portal:Graph, Wall, Tome|Hub Page]]'''
** [[Portal:Decoding the Graph-Wall-Tome Connection]]
** [[Portal:Editing the Graph]]
** [[Portal:Defacing the Wall]]
** [[Portal:Rewriting the Tome]]
* [[Portal:Porta]] - [https://discord.gg/cmr32pJ Discord]
* [[Portal:Portal Book Club]] - [https://discord.gg/su5uMWd Discord]
** [[Portal:The Road to Reality Study Notes]]
* [[Portal:Theory of Geometric Unity]] - [https://discord.gg/hej6Yfu Discord]}}
    </div>
    <div class="grid-column">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Slipping the DISC===
|content=In almost any field of human activity, mechanisms emerge to suppress or downregulate ideas that may upset or drastically alter the field's structure. These become pathological when they are used to suppress truth, research, and innovation, betraying an organization's purpose.
* '''[[Portal:Slipping the DISC|Hub Page]]'''
* [[Portal:Early Voices of the Coronavirus]] - [https://discord.gg/78wqu4N Discord]
* [[Portal:Russell Conjugation Illuminator]] - [https://discord.gg/MkqVGPp Discord]
* [[Portal:Science Since Babylon]]
* [[Portal:Science, The Endless Frontier]]}}
    </div>
    <div class="grid-column">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Meta Projects===
|content=The Portal contains many ideas, and tracking them can be difficult. These projects organize and reconvey these ideas, or develop technology to convey them.
* [[Portal:3D Printing for the Portal]] - [https://discord.gg/Djh4mY6 Discord]
* [[Portal:Eric’s Most Important Set of Books]]
* [[Portal:Eric's Nightmare Species]]
* [[Portal:Ericisms]]
* [[Portal:Eric Weinstein Quotes]] - [https://discord.gg/dxMQxeM Discord]
* [[Portal:Episode Highlights]]
* [[Portal:The Portal Clips]] - [https://discord.gg/RuvXkdR Discord]
* [[Portal:Portal Mobile App]] - [https://discord.gg/RsbCyHn Discord]
* [[Portal:Portal VR]]
* [[Portal:Portal Player]] - [https://discord.gg/mPpysKq Discord]
* [[Portal:The Portal Essay Club]]
* '''[[Portal:Portal Wiki|The Portal Wiki]]''' - [https://discord.gg/U28Ws5U Discord]
* [[Portal:Predictions Eric Got Right]] - [https://discord.gg/gwXh5nz Discord]
* [[Portal:Riffs to Animate]] - [https://discord.gg/SuQVrny Discord]
* [[Portal:Transcript Completion Project]] - [https://discord.gg/6cQueyq Discord]
* [[Portal:Tribal Drinking Songs]] - [https://discord.gg/g4DsDSz Discord]}}
    </div>
</div><section end=projects-boxes />

== Contribution ==
<div class="projects-container">
    <div class="grid-column">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Starting a Project===
|content=First you have an idea, then it becomes a project. Make something of substance or show how previous work will help you make meaningful contributions.}}
    </div>
    <div class="grid-column">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Joining a Project===
|content=Join the Discord and reach out to the people who are currently involved in the project.}}
    </div>
</div>

== Past Projects ==
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Archived/Completed Projects===
|content=Projects that have either been completed or remained long inactive are listed here. Projects that began in name only and showed no public development are removed from the wiki.
* [[Portal:Climbing the Cliff]] (Archived) - [https://discord.gg/Bcxk8P8 Discord]
* [[Portal:Deface the Wall]] (Completed)
* [[Portal:Holonomy Project]] (Stalled)
* [[Portal:Interactive Wall]] (Completed) - [https://discord.gg/taJYAY9 Discord]
* [[Portal:Postprint]] (Archived)
* [[Portal:We the Screamers]] (Completed) - [https://discord.gg/RmSASA5 Discord]}}

[[Category:Projects]]
[[Category:Community]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
